events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Enduring Icon
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still effortlessly commanding the stage. Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger, a true rock 'n' roll force of nature!

events.title: MTV launched, 'Video Killed The Radio Star' first video
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched in the US with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV's Legacy
angles.copy: Remember when music television actually played music? Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed the game forever, kicking off with a perfectly ironic tune. What was the first video you remember seeing on MTV?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Twenty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and Britpop was never the same. An absolute game-changer from start to finish. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, concluded on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music. Woodstock wasn't just a festival; it was a cultural phenomenon. Imagine being there!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since we lost the King. Elvis Presley's impact on music and culture is immeasurable. His legacy truly lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's shooting
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty years ago, the music world lost a true visionary. Tupac Shakur's rhymes and messages continue to resonate deeply.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago, the world lost a musical pioneer. Jimi Hendrix redefined what was possible with a guitar. His influence is still felt in every riff.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover alone is legendary, let alone the incredible music within!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Rebel
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the one and only Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking and inspiring with that unmistakable voice and attitude.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock'n'Roll Star
angles.copy: Our Kid is another year older! Happy 54th birthday to the legendary Liam Gallagher. Still bringing the swagger and the tunes.

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine'
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic solo single 'Imagine' on this day in 1971.

angles.name: A Song For Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. A timeless anthem for peace and unity that still resonates today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple introduced the first-generation iPod, revolutionising portable music, on this day in 2001.

angles.name: Music Revolution
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? Twenty-five years ago, Apple changed how we listen to music forever. Suddenly, thousands of songs fit in your pocket!

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Sixty-four years of shaken, not stirred, adventures. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the best Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend, John Lennon.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace continue to inspire generations.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary English actor, comedian, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the utterly brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on this day in 1968.

angles.name: Double Album Delight
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years ago, The Beatles delivered 'The White Album'. A sprawling, eclectic masterpiece that showed every facet of their genius. What's your favourite track?
